screens.name: projects/5670372511067729208/screens/4369c68b9a76408fbe178d1db1545c93
screens.prompt:
Title: Deniz Restaurant Menu Services Grid
Context: Mediterranean seafood restaurant website landing page.
Description of the screen: An elegant 'Özel Lezzetlerimiz' (Our Special Flavors) section for Deniz Restaurant in Bodrum. The section features a centered title in Playfair Display serif font with a decorative gold wave-style divider underneath. Below the title is a 3x2 grid of 6 menu/service category cards. Each card has a clean white background, a refined gold icon or subtle illustration at the top, a deep blue header (#1a365d) for the category name, and a short description in Inter sans-serif font. The cards include: 1. Deniz Ürünleri (Fresh daily catch and grilled fish), 2. Meze & Salatalar (Traditional Mediterranean appetizers), 3. İçecekler (Local Turkish wines and drinks), 4. Tatlılar (Homemade Turkish sweets), 5. Özel Günler (Private dining and celebrations), and 6. Deniz Manzarası (Scenic waterfront dining). Each card features an elegant hover effect with a soft shadow and a subtle gold border accent (#d4af37).
Platform: web
Form factor: desktop
screens.title: Deniz Restaurant Menu Services Grid

outputComponents.text:
I've designed the "Özel Lezzetlerimiz" (Our Special Flavors) section for Deniz Restaurant:

- **Deniz Restaurant Menu Services Grid**: This section features a clean 3x2 grid of 6 elegant category cards, including Seafood, Starters, Beverages, Desserts, Special Events, and Sea View. Each card incorporates deep ocean blue headers, gold accents, and a sophisticated hover effect to guide the user's focus through your offerings.

Would you like to continue by designing a **Galeri (Gallery)** section to showcase the stunning waterfront views and food?

outputComponents.suggestion: Design a "Galeri" section with high-quality photos
Add a "Müşteri Yorumları" (Customer Reviews) testimonial section
Create a full-page digital menu view for "Deniz Ürünleri"
